message:
test(buffer): add 30 edge case tests for buffer operations

Comprehensive edge case coverage for OptimizedBuffer:
- Boundary conditions (zero/single/large/tall/wide buffers)
- Drawing operations at and past boundaries
- Scissor clipping (nesting, intersection, out-of-bounds)
- Opacity stack operations (extremes, nesting, underflow)
- Wide character handling at buffer edges

Closes bd-1t6h

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
